note: No interactive user surface exists for this milestone. Project uses scrutiny-only validation per mission guidance. All assertions verified through automated test suite (clj -M:test) — the only user surface for this Clojure DSL pipeline library. 222 tests, 1535 assertions, 0 failures, 0 errors. Required LD_LIBRARY_PATH fix for CUDA libraries (nvidia-cusparselt) to resolve PyTorch import errors.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented CUDA library path requirement: LD_LIBRARY_PATH must include nvidia package lib dirs under pyenv for PyTorch/sentence-transformers to load. Installed nvidia-cusparselt-cu12 package.

testSuiteResults.environmentFix: LD_LIBRARY_PATH must include nvidia lib dirs from pyenv site-packages for CUDA libraries
